tasks.title: Initialize Rust project structure
tasks.description: Create Cargo.toml with dependencies and basic src/main.rs. Verify project builds successfully.
tasks.notes: WHEN cargo build is run, THE project SHALL compile without errors

tasks.title: Implement data models
tasks.description: Define serde-compatible structs for Canvas courses, modules, files, grades, and videos.
tasks.notes: WHEN the payload is parsed, THE system SHALL log the number of courses or modules found

tasks.title: Implement payload parser
tasks.description: Create parser module to read /tmp/course_payload.json and validate JSON structure with error handling.
tasks.notes:
IF the file does not exist, THEN THE system SHALL log an error message and exit with code 1
IF the file contains invalid JSON, THEN THE system SHALL log a parsing error and exit with code 1

tasks.title: Implement logging module
tasks.description: Create logger with timestamp support, operation tracking, and structured output for startup, operations, and summary.
tasks.notes:
WHEN the script starts, THE system SHALL log a startup message with timestamp
WHEN each major operation begins, THE system SHALL log the operation name

tasks.title: Implement file downloader
tasks.description: Create downloader module with async HTTP client to download files and organize by course/module structure.
tasks.notes:
WHEN downloading a file, THE system SHALL save it to a ./downloads directory organized by course/module
IF a download fails, THEN THE system SHALL log the error and continue with remaining files

tasks.title: Implement directory creation
tasks.description: Add logic to create downloads and output directories if they don't exist.
tasks.notes: IF the downloads directory does not exist, THEN THE system SHALL create it

tasks.title: Implement grade extractor
tasks.description: Create grade extraction logic to parse assignment names, scores, and total points, then save to output/grades.json.
tasks.notes:
WHEN grades are found, THE system SHALL extract assignment name, score, and total points
WHEN grades are extracted, THE system SHALL save them to ./output/grades.json

tasks.title: Implement video link extractor
tasks.description: Add video extraction logic to identify YouTube, Vimeo, mp4, and embedded videos, then save to output/videos.json.
tasks.notes:
WHEN the payload is parsed, THE system SHALL identify all video links (YouTube, Vimeo, mp4, embedded videos)
WHEN videos are extracted, THE system SHALL save them to ./output/videos.json

tasks.title: Implement CLI argument parsing
tasks.description: Add clap-based CLI with --help and --version flags, including validation for invalid arguments.
tasks.notes:
WHEN the script is run with --help flag, THE system SHALL display usage information and exit
WHEN the script is run with --version flag, THE system SHALL display the version number and exit

tasks.title: Implement operation logging and error handling
tasks.description: Add logging for operation start/completion with duration tracking and comprehensive error context.
tasks.notes:
WHEN each major operation completes, THE system SHALL log success/failure status and duration
IF any error occurs, THEN THE system SHALL log the error with context before continuing or exiting

tasks.title: Implement summary reporting
tasks.description: Add final summary logging with counts of downloaded files, grades found, and videos extracted.
tasks.notes:
WHEN the script completes, THE system SHALL log a summary including files downloaded, grades found, and videos extracted
WHEN the script completes successfully, THE system SHALL exit with code 0

tasks.title: Integration testing and error path validation
tasks.description: Test all error paths including missing file, invalid JSON, download failures, and empty result sets.
tasks.notes: WHEN any error occurs, THEN THE system SHALL exit with appropriate code and error message
